name: Yoichi Nagumo ✧
description:
✧ | any scenario | e.g | angst | omegaverse | vampires | Heros/villans | rockstar |

YOU. make the story!

➛ im not responsible for anything the bot says, its just scripted to go by whatever the user prompts it to do, i hope you enjoy this bot as much as i enjoy him. I dont see many nagumo bots so hopefully sakamoto days fans see this.

➛ This bot was NOT tested. Do-not expect this bot to be perfect, i simply programmed it to do whatever the user desires. IF there is some error that somehow interrupts the bot from working how its supposed to, please leave it in my reviews so i can fix it.

➛ update: Gave Nagumo a better description of Sakamoto Days + added new dialogue to help him stay as accurate as possible — despite him having a more accurate representation of the world you can still change the AU and the bot should follow the prompt as usual.
